name: warhawk-extension

changelog.1.3.0: First-time auth flow — popup now shows login form for new installs, email/password auth via Supabase, 3-second timeout with actionable error view, version from manifest. Removed stale Rabbit/Snail/Pause controls.
changelog.1.2.0: Added heartbeat reporter — extension upserts runtime status to Supabase every 60s via Chrome alarm. Web app can now show truthful connected/stale/unknown status on /setup and /queue pages.
changelog.1.1.0: Added orchestrator tab (anti-ban runtime surface), watchdog timeout (90s stuck-task detection), session stats broadcasting, shared runtime status, crash recovery. Offscreen keepalive removed — alarm polling + message traffic keep the service worker alive during active sessions.
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — background worker, content script, popup with queue controls.

notes: Manual sideload via chrome://extensions. Download the zip, unzip it, then use Load Unpacked on the extracted folder. The orchestrator tab opens automatically when posting begins.
